game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **极速变色龙 (Chameleon Run):** Players control a character that automatically runs forward across a series of platforms, with movement speed increasing gradually throughout each level. The core mechanic involves tapping the left side of the screen to jump over gaps and black obstacles, and tapping the right side to instantly switch the character's color between pink and yellow. Players must ensure their character's color precisely matches the color of the platform they land on; landing on a mismatched color or colliding with a black obstacle results in immediate failure and a level restart. Each of the non-linear levels presents 3 specific objectives, such as collecting all 10 tokens or completing the level within a 45-second time limit, which must be achieved to earn stars and unlock subsequent stages. Progression is driven by mastering precise jumps, including "head jumps" off specific enemies and "jump from nowhere" mechanics for advanced maneuvers, to achieve the fastest completion times and earn all objectives.
game_info.description: Race through dynamic platforming levels as a color-shifting chameleon! Your character runs automatically, gaining speed as you progress. Match your color (pink or yellow) to the platforms you land on, or face instant failure. Collect tokens, avoid black obstacles, and complete levels within time limits to earn stars and unlock new stages. Master precise jumps and color switches to achieve the fastest times!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Up / Space: Jump over gaps and obstacles
Arrow Left: Switch to Pink color
Arrow Right: Switch to Yellow color
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement and color switching mechanics. Validates that the player can jump, switch colors, and interact with platforms correctly without completing the level.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Execute a series of jumps and color switches while moving forward. Test landing on both pink and yellow platforms. Verify color matching mechanics work properly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully jumps and switches colors. Lands on matching platforms without dying. Game mechanics respond correctly to inputs. No crashes or unexpected behavior.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully jumps and switches colors. Lands on matching platforms without dying. Game mechanics respond correctly to inputs. No crashes or unexpected behavior.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing the optimal strategy to complete the level and achieve a win condition. This validates that the game can be beaten and the win state is reachable.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate through the entire level with perfect timing. Switch colors proactively before landing. Jump over all gaps and obstacles. Collect tokens when possible and reach the goal platform.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player reaches the end of the level successfully. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. All mechanics work as intended throughout the full playthrough. Win condition is properly triggered.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing token collection mechanics and score tracking. Validates that collecting tokens updates the game state correctly and contributes to level objectives.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Prioritize collecting all visible tokens while maintaining color matching and avoiding obstacles. Track score increases and token count updates.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: All tokens are collected successfully. Score increases appropriately. Token counter updates correctly. Collection doesn't interfere with other game mechanics.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing failure conditions and game over states. Validates that landing on mismatched colors and hitting obstacles correctly triggers game over.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Intentionally land on platforms with mismatched colors. Collide with black obstacles. Verify each failure condition triggers appropriate game over state.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Game correctly detects color mismatches and obstacle collisions. Transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Failure feedback is clear and game state is properly updated.
